headline: Quest Diagnostics, Altria, and 12 More Stocks That Are Coming Back to Life After a Rough Patch
summary: Almost half of S&P 500 stocks are down for the year, but a bunch show signs they are reviving. Our screen spotlights the most promising.

raw.headline: Quest Diagnostics, Altria, and 12 More Stocks That Are Coming Back to Life After a Rough Patch
raw.summary: Almost half of S&P 500 stocks are down for the year, but a bunch show signs they are reviving. Our screen spotlights the most promising.

headline: Oracle adds Cleveland Clinic CEO to board of directors
summary: Dr. Tomislav Mihaljevic’s appointment comes months after Oracle named another healthcare leader, former Quest Diagnostics CEO Stephen Rusckowski, to the board as the technology giant expands its reach in the sector.

raw.headline: Oracle adds Cleveland Clinic CEO to board of directors
raw.summary: Dr. Tomislav Mihaljevic’s appointment comes months after Oracle named another healthcare leader, former Quest Diagnostics CEO Stephen Rusckowski, to the board as the technology giant expands its reach in the sector.

headline: Labcorp expands Epic pact to make full test menu available on Aura
summary: The Labcorp agreement continues the expansion of Aura, which gives healthcare providers access to tests from companies including Quest Diagnostics.

raw.headline: Labcorp expands Epic pact to make full test menu available on Aura
